1.content:
You see the manor as the sun is getting close the the horizon. You got this. Near the opening you see a tall, slim, black, and white skunk with a purple suit and black pants. He is leaning up against a run down ticket booth and seems to be bored out of his mind. As you approach, he notices and his eyes brighten as he springs to life.

“Howdy, I’m Joshua, owner of this here manor,” he says.”are you here for the contest?”
1.title: The entrance

11.content:
He bursts with excitement

“Yes! I love seeing new contestants (mostly because we don’t see any return), but you my friend might just be the one to win it big!”

You can smell a tiny amount of musk coming off of Josh as he bounces around with glee.

“Alrighty, to participate in this maze you mast have 3 things: 27 cents, a maze issued phone, and a nose of steel!” He says with joy in his eyes.
“Now. Are you ready!”
11.title: Yes

111.content:
“Alright! Here is your phone and your 27 cents.”
“ now on the count of three you are going to run as fast as you can through that door. Don’t worry I’ll keep it open.” He chuckles.” Now just stand behind this line and we’ll be all set to go.”

Joshua walks over, opens the door and stands to the side of it.

“On your mark! 3...2..1..... GO!”
111.title: Yeah

1111.content:
You run as fast as you can through the door and into the mist of the maze.

Ah read of you is a door that has a picture of a phone taped onto it. There is also a bit scratched up button on the wall to the right of the door.

What do you do

* author note* this is technically the beginning of the game so you will have a health bar from here on out. You will lose health whenever you encounter an event and fail or get unlucky. You can also lose lives by making Bad decision. Different events and smells will take a different amount of live. If you lose all your lives you will lose the game. Have fun now.
1111.title: Run

11111.content:
5/5 health

You enter the room and it seems to have a few fog machines in it. Cool

Over the loud speakers you can hear Joshua,” ah, so you made it to the phone room. These rooms are scattered throughout the maze. There is no traps or encounters of any kind in these rooms.
While in these rooms you can call on a “friend” to assist you with the next part of the maze. But be warned. They might know as little as you do.”

The speaker turns off

There is another door which has amaze symbol on it.

There is also what appears to be an elevator but it doesn’t seem to be powered on.
11111.title: Door

111111.content:
5/5health
You open the door and see a long hallway leading to a bigger room. You can hear something is in the big room.

There is also an opening in the hallway going left and a blue door on the right.

Where do you go?
111111.title: Go through the maze door

1111111.content:
As you enter the big room, you see a huge anthro Labrador who is at least 2 times you size!

You have to react quick, he is approaching you.

You see a set of stairs leading up.

What do you do
1111111.title: Big room

11111111.content:
You try bracing for the dogs impact, but you are quickly shouldered to the floor.as you lay there, in a bit of pain, you see the lab pull up a chair next to you. He sits down and hovers his two massive paws above your face. “I get them every time.” The Labrador states.

The lab lowers his sweaty bare paws onto you face. Immediately you can hit with the smell of corn chips and rotten cheese. His feet Taste salty and are very wet. The feeling and scent of the dogs foot odor starts to get to you a bit.

4/5 health, you have a simi-chub

He eventually gets his rank feet off of you and allows you to move to the stairs. You’ll just have to get used to the smell that is clinging to you face.
11111111.title: Fight

111111111.content:
As you approach the stairs you see that there is a piece of red tape right down the center of the steps. There is two signs; one on each side of the stairs.

The sign on the left says safe and slow.

The sign on the right says fast but hell.

Which one do you side do you pick?
111111111.title: Upstairs

info.brief_description: Whiffington Manor is a first person maze/ dungeon crawler game.
info.description:
The unholy hell house know as Wiffington Manor, was once the birthing place of a government agency who’s mission was to discover more effective ways of torture. To test their new methods, they needed subjects. They tried multiple methods on both humans and furries while storing the survivors in cages underneath the house. The experiments were eventually cancelled and the agency was able to go back to their previous occupations. As for the prisoners, they were left to rot. Around these jailed souls was a anthro skunk names Joshua. Along with his aquatints Lial, an otter, and Keth, a white rat, they were able to break out of the underground prison and free all the surviving prisoners. But, Joshua wasn’t going to let a perfectly good building go to waste. He told Lial and Keth his plans to make this house into simi-torturous maze, to have a bit of fun and therapy. They all agreed on the ideas (one less than the other two) and told the prisoners about the plan. The ones who wanted to go home were free to do so, but the ones who stayed were ready to have so fun.

They opened up shop about a year ago and have kinda been the laughing stalk of the town. It’s become a place where you bet your friend to go in for a joke, or you tell someone you don’t like that it’s a haunted house attraction. But, they decided to change it up this year. $500,000 prize upon completion of the maze. Who ever makes it to the heart of the house wins it all.

You could really use half a million dollars. It would take you very very far. As far away from this crummy town as you can get. Now getting that cash is all up to you.
